title: LATEST: Vancouver Mayor Ken Sim's proposal to invest city reserves in $BTC is blocked by the city charter, which limits municipal funds to government bonds, ...
snippet: CoinDesk (@CoinDesk): LATEST: Vancouver Mayor Ken Sim's proposal to invest city reserves in $BTC is blocked by the city charter, which limits municipal funds to government bonds, bank deposits, and other conservative assets.
